questions.question: Which is the first public sector bank to go live on the Direct Tax Collection System Tin 2.0?
questions.explanation: Bank of India (BOI) has become the first public sector bank to go live on Income Tax Department’s new Direct Tax Collection System Tin 2.0. With this integration, taxpayers will now get a single platform for their tax payments and the e-filing of tax returns. Taxpayers can now make direct tax payment at any branch of the Bank of India across the country.

questions.question: Which Indian shuttler holds the tops spot in the men’s singles category in BWF World Tour Rankings?
questions.explanation: Indian shuttler HS Prannoy holds the tops spot in the men’s singles category in BWF World Tour Rankings. He was part of the Indian team that won the Thomas Cup in 2022. The ace badminton player has reachd quarterfinals consistently in most of the events held this year.

questions.question: India’s longest rubber dam ‘Gayaji Dam’ was inaugurated in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar inaugurated India’s longest rubber dam ‘Gayaji Dam’ on the Falgu River. It is a vast stretch of sand dunes. He also inaugurated the steel foot over bridge for the convenience of visitors who visit during Pitripaksha Mela. “The dam has been built at an estimated cost of Rs 324crore with the guidance from IIT (Roorkee).

questions.question: When is the ‘National Forest Martyrs Day’ observed in India?
questions.explanation: ‘National Forest Martyrs Day’ is observed on September 11 to pay tribute to the people who sacrificed their lives to protect forests and wildlife. In 2013, Union Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change declared that the day in honour of forests and those who work to protect them. It was on the same day in 1730, the infamous Khejarli massacre took place, where Bishnoi community offered their lives to save Khejarli trees from being cut down.

questions.question: Which sportsperson on the BusinessLine’s ‘Iconic changemaker of the year’ award in 2022?
questions.explanation: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman presented BusinessLine’s Changemaker of the Year award to Bharat Biotech. Mithali Raj, the veteran women cricket player of Indian team, who brought laurels to the country was presented the iconic changemaker of the year award. Institutions including DeHaat and Zerodha, as well as achievers including Ramesh Raliya, Prachi Shevagaonkar and Akash Singh were among the winners.

questions.question: India is set to re-introduce Cheetahs from Namibia in which National Park?
questions.explanation: India is set to re-introduce Cheetahs from South Africa’s Namibia in Madhya Pradesh’s Kuno Palpur National Park. After the Cheetahs arrive in the National Park, they will stay in smaller enclosures during the quarantine phase before being shifted to the bigger ones. Cheetahs went extinct in India in 1952 and the ‘African Cheetah Introduction Project in India’ was started in 2009.

questions.question: Which is the first bank in India to issue an electronic bank guarantee (e-BG)?
questions.explanation: India’s largest private sector bank HDFC Bank became the first bank in the country to issue an electronic bank guarantee (e-BG) in partnership with National E-Governance Services Ltd. Issuing bank guarantee was a paper based and time-consuming process. It has been eliminated with the new electronic guarantees that can be processed, verified and delivered instantly with increased security.

questions.question: India recently signed a MoU with which country for the training of diplomats?
questions.explanation: A Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed between India and Madagascar for the training of diplomats It was signed during a special ceremony organized at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Madagascar. The signing of this MOU aims for enhancing cooperation between our two countries in the crucial arena of training of diplomats. It will also encourage exchange of information and content of training programmes for diplomats.

questions.question: MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) partnered with which company to launch ‘XR Startup Program’?
questions.explanation: MeitY Startup Hub (MSH), an initiative of the Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY), and Meta, announced the launch of an accelerator programme to accelerate XR technology startups across India. The ‘XR Startup Program’ will support 40 early-stage start-ups working in XR technologies including Augmented Reality (AR) and Virtual Reality (VR) with a grant of Rs 20 lakhs each

questions.question: Which institution launched the guidelines to identify mental health children in school going children?
questions.explanation: National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) released the guidelines for ‘Early identification and intervention for mental health problems in school going children and adolescents’. The guidelines include setting up of a mental health advisory panel, school based mental health programme and pedagogical support to ensure mental well- being of students and engaging parents.
